description: Fitz and Simmons are split up as prisoners in HYDRA's English castle facility. Malick presses Simmons for portal secrets; Ward tries to break Fitz. Giyera uses his power to torture Simmons, while Ward torments Fitz emotionally, threatening Simmons' safety until Fitz gives up information.
location: English castle (site of the monolith / Distant Star Pathfinder facility)

transcript.line: Get them up. You know, my father used to say, “never send a boy to do a man's job,” but it honestly never occurred to me that I should try sending a young woman. Tell me, Ms. Simmons, when you went through, did you see it? You didn't tell me she was so feral.
The secrets you must have hiding in that pretty little head of yours, just waiting to be shared.
Well, never gonna help you put another bloody portal.
Nobody's asking you to. See, Hydra's been opening one portal or another for centuries. And all it takes is a few stones and a building with just the right vibrational frequency.
They don't know how to get back.
You really are a sharp cookie. Maybe now you're ready to reveal the secret.
Come a little closer and find out.
